response.justification: Candidate is significantly overqualified for a junior/mid-level position, holding Staff and Senior Software Engineer titles with 15+ years of experience. While the technical skills (TypeScript, React, Node.js, AWS, Kubernetes) strongly match the stack and nice-to-haves (AI/LLM work at re:cinq, K8s deployment for GISCollective), hiring a staff-level engineer into an entry-level role typically leads to compensation mismatch, retention risk, and role dissatisfaction. No PostgreSQL or Nest.js experience explicitly listed (MongoDB and generic SQL instead). Berlin-based, matching the on-site requirement.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js/React fullstack experience plus AWS, Docker, Kubernetes
Berlin-based, satisfying high on-site presence requirement
Bonus AI/LLM/MCP exposure matching nice-to-have qualifications
concerns: Severely overqualified — Staff/Senior titles vs. entry-level role creates retention and salary-fit risk
No explicit PostgreSQL or Nest.js experience; database background is MongoDB-heavy
Likely compensation expectations far exceed junior/mid-level budget
